name: postgres-backend-pattern
question: How should SQL compilation and execution be integrated?
decision: Create PostgresBackend class that wraps SqlBackend (compilation) + BunSqlExecutor (execution). SqlBackend stays unchanged as stateless compiler. PostgresBackend.execute() does: compile via SqlBackend -> execute via BunSqlExecutor -> normalize field names -> return rows.
rationale: Clear separation of concerns: SqlBackend compiles queries (pure function), BunSqlExecutor runs SQL (I/O), PostgresBackend orchestrates the flow. PostgresBackend implements IBackend interface for registry compatibility.
